Trump Announces US Navy Blockade of Strait of Hormuz After Failed Iran Talks | NO | HIGH confidence**  
President Trump ordered US Navy ships to blockade Iranian ports in the Strait of Hormuz starting April 13, 2026, following collapsed weekend negotiations over Iran's nuclear program, amid a fragile ceasefire.[1][2]
